title: Snowflake
excerpt: description: Query R2 Data Catalog tables from Snowflake using a catalog integration. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Below is an example of using [Snowflake ↗](https://docs.snowflake.com/en/user-guide/tables-iceberg-configure-catalog-integration-rest) to connect and query data from R2 Data Catalog (read-only). * Sign up for a [Cloudflare account ↗](https://dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up/workers-and-pages).
